'''鈭歜-s-g''' ('''kabasag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadruple|quadruple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadruple|quadruple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-s-g
|-
! Lemma
| kabasag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibasag|thibasag]] || [[word:jibasag|jibasag]] || [[word:shibasag|shibasag]] || [[word:kibasag|kibasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubasag|thuthubasag]] || [[word:jujubasag|jujubasag]] || [[word:shushubasag|shushubasag]] || [[word:kukubasag|kukubasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubasag|thubasag]] || [[word:jubasag|jubasag]] || [[word:shubasag|shubasag]] || [[word:kubasag|kubasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubasag|thubasag]] || [[word:jubasag|jubasag]] || [[word:shubasag|shubasag]] || [[word:kubasag|kubasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebasag|thebasag]] || [[word:jebasag|jebasag]] || [[word:shebasag|shebasag]] || [[word:kebasag|kebasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobasag|thothobasag]] || [[word:jojobasag|jojobasag]] || [[word:shoshobasag|shoshobasag]] || [[word:kokobasag|kokobasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasag|thobasag]] || [[word:jobasag|jobasag]] || [[word:shobasag|shobasag]] || [[word:kobasag|kobasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasag|thobasag]] || [[word:jobasag|jobasag]] || [[word:shobasag|shobasag]] || [[word:kobasag|kobasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]] || [[word:basag|basag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙basag|th忙basag]] || [[word:j忙basag|j忙basag]] || [[word:sh忙basag|sh忙basag]] || [[word:k忙basag|k忙basag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabasag|thathabasag]] || [[word:jajabasag|jajabasag]] || [[word:shashabasag|shashabasag]] || [[word:kakabasag|kakabasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabasag|thabasag]] || [[word:jabasag|jabasag]] || [[word:shabasag|shabasag]] || [[word:kabasag|kabasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabasag|thabasag]] || [[word:jabasag|jabasag]] || [[word:shabasag|shabasag]] || [[word:kabasag|kabasag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabasag|shabasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabasag|goshabasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabasag|gokishabasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabasagn眉|shabasagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabasagnkn眉|goshabasagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasagn眉|gokishabasagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabasagsh毛|shabasagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabasagnksh毛|goshabasagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabasagsh毛|gokishabasagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasagro|shabasagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasagnkro|goshabasagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasagro|gokishabasagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasagmu|shabasagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasagnkmu|goshabasagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasagmu|gokishabasagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabasagsher|shabasagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabasagnksher|goshabasagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabasagsher|gokishabasagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabasagng|shabasagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabasagnkng|goshabasagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabasagng|gokishabasagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabasagya|shabasagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabasagnkya|goshabasagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabasagya|gokishabasagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabasagyam|shabasagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabasagnkyam|goshabasagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabasagyam|gokishabasagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasagn眉sh毛|shabasagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasagnkn眉sh毛|goshabasagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasagn眉sh毛|gokishabasagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasagn眉ro|shabasagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasagnkn眉ro|goshabasagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasagn眉ro|gokishabasagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasagn眉mu|shabasagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasagnkn眉mu|goshabasagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasagn眉mu|gokishabasagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasagsh毛n眉|shabasagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasagnksh毛n眉|goshabasagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasagsh毛n眉|gokishabasagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasagsh毛ro|shabasagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasagnksh毛ro|goshabasagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasagsh毛ro|gokishabasagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasagsh毛mu|shabasagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasagnksh毛mu|goshabasagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasagsh毛mu|gokishabasagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasagron眉|shabasagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasagnkron眉|goshabasagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasagron眉|gokishabasagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasagrosh毛|shabasagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasagnkrosh毛|goshabasagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasagrosh毛|gokishabasagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasagromu|shabasagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasagnkromu|goshabasagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasagromu|gokishabasagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasagmun眉|shabasagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasagnkmun眉|goshabasagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasagmun眉|gokishabasagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasagmush毛|shabasagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasagnkmush毛|goshabasagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasagmush毛|gokishabasagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasagmuro|shabasagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasagnkmuro|goshabasagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasagmuro|gokishabasagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
